reference: Can you tell me what brings you in here today? So I've had this, uh, this cough that it started two days ago and it's been getting worse. I've been bringing up this rust colored sputum. OK, and the shortness of breath, is it just with the exertion or it can, is it happening at rest? How are you feeling right now? Yeah, even right now it feels like I'm not able to get, I don't know, a full breath, it just feels like it's more difficult to to breathe. OK, have you felt any kind of dizziness or fainting episodes? No, I haven't. OK. Have you been feeling any chest pain at all? Uh, no, I, I I haven't had any chest pain. OK, and so with your coughing you're producing the rust colored sputum, but how much would you say you're producing? Uh I would say, yeah, maybe three or four teaspoons every every couple hours. OK, are you producing any blood like in your cough or sputum at all? No, it wasn't really red, it's kinda orange. Orange, OK. Any greenish or yellow material? No, I haven't noticed anything like that. OK. Any fevers or chills? Yeah, I have had, I've had both of those. I've had a I I checked my temperature this morning and it was 38.2 and I was pretty chilly last night. OK. Uhm, and before these symptoms started, were you having any similar symptoms at all before? Uhm, any anything that makes your symptoms better or worse that you've tried? I did try some over the counter cold medicine.
